head: 8e9be379

scenarios.notes: Reply explains Reyn capabilities (skills + tasks); user_message_received=1; no permission_denied. No artifact requirement.
Reply explains idempotency clearly (math + API meaning). must_emit=[]; no permission_denied. No artifact requirement after B49 fix.
Reply lists multiple skill names (skill__direct_llm, skill__eval, skill__eval_builder, skill__index_docs, ...). chat_turn_completed_inline=1 satisfies must_emit_any; no permission_denied.
Reply returns word count (9) and token estimate. routing_decided=1, skill_run_spawned(word_stats_demo)=1, skill_run_completed(status=finished)=1; artifact via word_stats_demo skill_run present.

Reply asks user to pick a theme instead of producing a poem (= no poem text, fewer than 2 lines of poetic form). Rubric requires poem with >=2 lines and natural poetic form. chat_turn_completed_inline=1 (must_emit_any OK); however artifacts requirement (direct_llm present) NOT met — no skill_run_spawned. Rubric + artifact both fail.
Turn 2 reply contains [x*x for x in range(10)] coherent with turn 1 (list comprehension). Both turns: user_message_received=2; no permission_denied.

Reply asks for image-generation parameters (subject/style/mood/colour) as if it can generate the image — neither politely declines nor explains capability unavailable. Pretends generation is possible. must_emit=[]; no permission_denied (events_pass holds).

new_findings: S5 (catalog_routing_decided_emitted): flash-lite router answers '短い詩を書いてください' by asking for theme clarification instead of producing a poem inline; no direct_llm dispatch either, so artifacts requirement also fails. Same R verdict as B51 baseline (pattern persists at HEAD 8e9be379).

S7 (out_of_scope_graceful_decline): flash-lite does not decline image generation; instead it elicits image specs as if it could fulfil the request. Behavioural attractor — router treats '画像を生成してください' as a normal task with missing parameters.
